overall.description: A cinematic third-person game sequence showing a female character in a long dark dress running through a snowy, foggy rural village at night. The character moves along a stone path past wooden lamp posts, rustic fences, and traditional wooden buildings, transitioning from open landscape into a village and back into dense forest.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy forest trail approaching village outskirts

agents.ego_description: running steadily along the snowy path toward the village lights in the distance

entered.detail: tall pine trees covered in snow flanking the left side of the path
snow-dusted stone trail winding through the landscape
gentle slope covered in snow rising on the right side
tall wooden post with warm lantern light illuminating the path ahead

segments.scene_description: The character runs along an open snowy trail surrounded by snow-covered trees. A wooden lamp post grows larger ahead as the character approaches the outskirts of a rural village.

scene_state.functional_zone: village entrance with wooden fences and traditional buildings

events.description: enters the village area passing wooden fences and rustic buildings

agents.ego_description: running through the village entrance between snow-dusted wooden fences

entered.detail: snow-covered wooden fence lining the right side of the path
traditional wooden house with snow-covered roof and warm interior light
stone well with wooden roof structure in the village center

segments.scene_description: The character enters a rustic village, passing wooden fences and traditional snow-covered buildings. A stone well becomes visible ahead as the character runs deeper into the settlement.

scene_state.functional_zone: village center with well and wooden balcony structures

events.description: passes the stone well on the left side of the path
two NPCs become visible standing on a wooden balcony to the right

agents.ego_description: running past the village well and continuing through the settlement toward the forest edge

notable_agents.action: two figures standing on a wooden balcony observing the path below

entered.detail: wooden balcony attached to the rustic building with snow-covered railings

segments.scene_description: The character passes a stone well and continues through the village, where two NPCs stand on a wooden balcony to the right. The path leads past rustic buildings toward the forest edge.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense snowy forest trail leaving village

events.description: exits the village and enters the dense snowy forest

agents.ego_description: running into the dense snowy forest away from the village

entered.detail: tall snow-covered pine trees closing in on the left side of the path

segments.scene_description: The character exits the village and enters a dense, foggy forest. Snow-covered trees close in on both sides of the narrow trail as the character continues running into the isolated woodland.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as a character runs from an open snowy trail through a rustic village and into a dense, foggy forest. It begins along a wide path surrounded by snow-covered trees, moving forward as a wooden lamp post signals the approach to the village outskirts. As the character enters the settlement, the open landscape shifts into a cluster of traditional snow-covered buildings and wooden fences, leading the camera past a stone well and toward two figures standing on a wooden balcony. The scene then opens up briefly at the village edge before the path narrows and the environment closes in. Finally, the camera follows the character as they exit the village and disappear into the isolated, foggy woodland where thick trees crowd the trail.
